allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs=[p for p in d['packages'] if p['name']=='ratatui-image']; print\(json.dumps\(pkgs[0]['features'],indent=2\)\) if pkgs else print\('not found'\)")
